author: KrustyKrew
name: CrewStats
description: Tracks weekly messages, voice time, casino wagering/wins, Pokebot catches/raids/dex/longest pokestop streak, and Overwatch challenge clears, then auto-posts a leaderboard embed and resets each week.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores per-guild, per-user counts of messages sent, seconds spent in voice channels, and the dates of daily Pokestop spins (used to compute the longest weekly streak) for the purpose of a weekly activity leaderboard. It also reads (but does not copy long-term) aggregate stats from the casino, PokeBot, and Overwatch cogs. This owned data is reset weekly and can be removed with Red's data deletion request.
